# Trolley Scout

> Trolley Scout finds grocery specials across supermarkets, compares store prices, locates nearby retailers, and searches property platforms. The useful shopping tools are free.

Trolley Scout is a single-page web app at https://trolleyscout.co.za/ with a native Android app (see the GitHub releases). Deal data is scouted from official retailer sources (Woolworths, Checkers, Shoprite, Pick n Pay, Clicks, Dis-Chem, Boxer, OK Foods, SPAR, Usave, Game, Makro and independent local stores) and refreshed continuously.

## Docs

- [Site overview](https://trolleyscout.co.za/index.md): what the app does, in markdown
- [API catalog](https://trolleyscout.co.za/.well-known/api-catalog): machine-readable list of public JSON endpoints

## Public JSON API (read-only, no key needed)

- [Deals and catalogues](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/discovery): current grocery deals and leaflet catalogues across retailers; supports no parameters
- [Retailers](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/retailers): the retailer registry with slugs and names
- [Nearby stores](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/nearby-stores?lat=-26.14&lon=28.15): supermarkets near a coordinate with each store's current deals and catalogues
- [Flash deals](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/deal-sites): aggregated flash/daily deals from OneDayOnly, Hyperli, Daddy's Deals and MyRunway
- [Community offers](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/offers): community-submitted local offers
- [Vouchers](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/vouchers): current voucher deals
- [Sponsored listings](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/public-ads?placement=feed): live sponsored listings by placement
- [Geocode](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/geocode?q=Soweto): geocode a South African address to coordinates
- [Health](https://trolleyscout.co.za/api/health): service liveness

## Agents

- [MCP server](https://trolleyscout.co.za/mcp): Model Context Protocol over Streamable HTTP with read-only tools (search_deals, nearby_stores, flash_deals)
- [MCP Server Card](https://trolleyscout.co.za/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json)
- [Agent Skills index](https://trolleyscout.co.za/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)
- [Authentication for agents](https://trolleyscout.co.za/auth.md)

## Optional

- [Android app releases](https://github.com/EugeneBoondock/trolleyscout/releases): downloadable APK
- [Source repository](https://github.com/EugeneBoondock/trolleyscout)
